scripts.pack:packages: pnpm --filter @lexd/core pack && pnpm --filter @lexd/stdlib-atproto pack && pnpm --filter @lexd/stdlib-standard pack && pnpm --filter @lexd/cli pack && pnpm --filter @lexd/language-server pack && pnpm --filter @lexd/vite-plugin pack
scripts.publish:packages: pnpm --filter @lexd/core publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @lexd/stdlib-atproto publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @lexd/stdlib-standard publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @lexd/cli publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @lexd/language-server publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @lexd/vite-plugin publish --access public --no-git-checks
